basics.name: Zhimin Zhang
basics.label: Ph.D. Student in Computer Application Technology
basics.summary: Ph.D. student at Wangxuan Institute of Computer Technology, Peking University. Research interests include 3D/4D generation, video generation, motion generation, world models, and embodied AI.

work.name: Kuaishou Kling AI
work.summary: Working on general object video motion transfer and camera motion cloning for video generation.
highlights: Explored explicit and implicit motion representations for non-human object motion transfer.
Contributed to OmniDirector camera cloning experiments and evaluation.

work.name: Peking University
work.summary: Research on 3D perception, motion generation, and video-related generative models.
highlights: First-author papers at ICASSP 2024 and ACM MM 2025.
Co-author on RangeLDM (ECCV 2024) and ongoing 3D reconstruction work.

publications.name: Behave Your Motion: Habit-preserved Cross-category Animal Motion Transfer
publications.summary: Habit-aware cross-category animal motion transfer with zero-shot generalization.

publications.name: RangeLDM: Fast Realistic LiDAR Point Cloud Generation
publications.summary: Fast realistic LiDAR point cloud generation.

publications.name: InvariantOODG: Learning Invariant Features of Point Clouds for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
publications.summary: Invariant feature learning for 3D point cloud out-of-distribution generalization.
